arts.ttl: When is the Carabao Cup draw? Arsenal and Tottenham target semi-final place
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup semi-final draw is scheduled to take place on Thursday evening - after the conclusion of Spurs' game vs Manchester United at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur will both be looking to secure their place in the semi-final draw for the Carabao Cup as their respective charges continue this week.

arts.ttl: 'He has to': Mikel Arteta's Gabriel Martinelli comments in 2021 explain where it's all gone wrong at Arsenal
arts.sum: Just a couple of years ago, Gabriel Martinelli was thought about in the same breath as Bukayo Saka at Arsenal After emerging from the depths...

arts.ttl: Chelsea already planning January deal with Arsenal as ace set for move across London
arts.sum: The January transfer window is only a couple of weeks away from opening and it seems that Arsenal are ready to sign Chelsea’s Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall. The Blues are open to offers as the midfielder hasn’t hit the heights expected and they hope to recoup their investment. arts.ttl: Nwaneri and Odegaard start, Tierney chance - Arsenal line-ups vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Crystal Palace: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Tierney; Partey, Merino, Odegaard; Saka, Jesus, Sterling I'm still not a fan of Thomas Partey at right back, so I'm going for Jurrien Timber alongside William Saliba and Jakub Kiwior.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal rival Manchester United for transfer of “very intelligent” versatile attacker
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly one of the clubs interested in a potential transfer swoop for Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani, along with their Premier League rivals Manchester United. The France international looks like someone who could realistically be available in the upcoming January transfer window due to his lack of playing time at PSG, and […] The post Report: Arsenal rival Manchester United for transfer of “very intelligent” versatile attacker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Not quick enough': Martin Keown says £67m striker Arsenal reportedly want to sign is way too slow for them
Mikel Arteta forced into unwanted call as Arsenal star to miss Crystal Palace Carabao Cup tie
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes will not be one of those however, after he returned to the starting XI this past weekend against Everton having missed the last three games. As the back-up goalkeeper to David Raya, the expectation was he would feature in cup games but having played for the Cherries in the Carabao Cup first round, he is ineligible to play for Arsenal in that competition.

arts.sum: Arsenal and Crystal Palace will go head-to-head in the EFL Cup quarter-final at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night.
